narrative:
Cols 36-D (precinct in Franklin County) has 729 registered voters, with 65.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 15.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.5%, a modest Democratic lean of 2.7 percentage points.
